axebot.name: Axebot
axebot.notes: Starts with Stock 2. Stock X: When killed, a new Axebot is summoned in its place (with Stock X - 1).

bowlbug (rock).name: Bowlbug (Rock)
bowlbug (rock).notes: Starts with Imbalanced Imbalanced: Becomes stunned if its attack is fully blocked.

bygone effigy.name: Bygone Effigy
bygone effigy.notes: Starts with Slow Slow: Attacks deal 10% extra damage for every card played this turn.

byrdonis.name: Byrdonis
byrdonis.notes: Starts with Territorial 1 Territorial X: At the end of its turn, gains X strength.

ceremonial beast.name: Ceremonial Beast
ceremonial beast.notes: Plow X: The first time Ceremonial Beast's HP reaches X or below, it becomes stunned and loses all strength. Ringing: You can only play 1 card this turn.

corpse slug.name: Corpse Slug
corpse slug.notes: Starts with Ravenous 4 (5) Ravenous X: When an enemy dies, become stunned and gain X Strength.

crusher.name: Crusher
crusher.notes: Starts with Back Attack and Crab Rage 5. Back Attack: Deals 50% more damage if attacking you from behind. Crab Rage X: When an ally dies, gains 5 strength and 99 block.

door.name: Door
door.notes: Starts with 3*N (4*N) strength Has 20*N (25*N) extra max HP. N = Number of times Door has been summoned (starts at N=0).

entomancer.name: Entomancer
entomancer.notes: Starts with Personal Hive 1 Personal Hive X: Add X Dazed to the draw pile whenever hit by an attack.

moves.name: Pheromone Spit
effects: If less than 3 Personal Hive: Gain 1 Personal Hive and 1 Strength
If at 3 Personal Hive: Gain 2 Strength

exoskeleton.name: Exoskeleton
exoskeleton.notes: Starts with Hard to Kill 9 Hard to Kill X: Reduce all damage taken and HP loss to X.

fat gremlin.name: Fat Gremlin
fat gremlin.notes: Starts stunned when summoned after killing Gremlin Merc. Keeps stolen gold if successfully Flees.

fossil stalker.name: Fossil Stalker
fossil stalker.notes: Starts with Suck 3 Suck X: Whenever Fossil Stalker deals unblocked attack damage, it gains X strength.

globe head.name: Globe Head
globe head.notes: Starts with Galvanic 6. Galvanic X: You take X damage when a Power is played.

gremlin merc.name: Gremlin Merc
gremlin merc.notes: Starts with Surprise and Thievery 20 Surprise: When killed, summons 1 Sneaky Gremlin and 1 Fat Gremlin (they start stunned) Thievery X: Steals X gold when attacking (stolen gold is held by Fat Gremlin once summoned)

hunter killer.name: Hunter Killer
hunter killer.notes: Tender: Whenever you play a card, lose 1 strength and 1 dexterity this turn.

infested prism.name: Infested Prism
infested prism.notes: Starts with Vital Spark 1 Vital Spark X: The first time Infected Prism takes attack damage each turn, the attacked gains X energy.

inklet.name: Inklet
inklet.notes: Starts with Slippery 1 Slippery X: The next time this enemy loses HP, it loses 1 HP instead.

knowledge demon.name: Knowledge Demon
knowledge demon.notes: Disintegration X: Take X damage at the end of your turn. (Stacks additively if selected multiple times) Mind Rot: Draw 1 fewer card at the start of your turn Sloth: You cannot play more than 3 cards per turn Waste Away: Gain 1 less energy at the start of your turn * Heal is multiplied by player count

moves.name: Curse of Knowledge
effects: Player must choose one of two debuffs:

lagavulin matriarch.name: Lagavulin Matriarch
lagavulin matriarch.notes: Starts with 12 Plating, and sleeps for 3 turns or until losing HP. On wakeup, all Plating is removed.

living fog.name: Living Fog
living fog.notes: Smoggy: You can only play 1 skill per turn.

moves.name: Bloat
effects: (N = # times Bloat has been used + 1, capped to 5)

living shield.name: Living Shield
living shield.notes: Starts with Rampart 25 Rampart X: Gives Turret Operator X block at the start of the player's turn.

louse progenitor.name: Louse Progenitor
louse progenitor.notes: Starts with Curl Up Curl Up: Gain 14 (18) block upon first being hit.

magi knight.name: Magi Knight
magi knight.notes: Dampen: While Magi Knight is alive, all your upgraded cards are downgraded.

myte.name: Myte
myte.notes: Toxic (status): At the end of your turn, take 5 damage if this is in your hand. 1 cost, exhausts.

ovicopter.name: Ovicopter
ovicopter.notes: Lay Eggs will summon until there are 3 allies alive (no allies alive -> summons 3, 1 allies alive -> summons 2, etc)

owl magistrate.name: Owl Magistrate
owl magistrate.notes: Soar: Receives 50% less attack damage until it lands.

phantasmal gardener.name: Phantasmal Gardener
phantasmal gardener.notes: Starts with Skittish 6 (7) Skittish X: First time hit each turn gain X block.

phrog parasite.name: Phrog Parasite
phrog parasite.notes: Starts with Infested 4 Infested X: Summons X Wrigglers after dying (they start stunned).

queen.name: Queen
queen.notes: Starts with a Torch Head Amalgam in play. If Amalgam dies, and intent is Burn Bright For Me, Enrage instead.

rocket.name: Rocket
rocket.notes: Starts with Back Attack and Crab Rage 5.

scroll of biting.name: Scroll of Biting
scroll of biting.notes: Starts with Paper Cuts 2 Paper Cuts X: Whenever you take unblocked attack damage from this enemy, lose X Max HP.

skulking colony.name: Skulking Colony
skulking colony.notes: Starts with Hardened Shell 20 Hardened Shell X: Cannot lose more than X HP per turn.

slithering strangler.name: Slithering Strangler
slithering strangler.notes: Constrict X: While the Slithering Strangler is alive, take X damage at the end of your turn.

slumbering beetle.name: Slumbering Beetle
slumbering beetle.notes: Starts with Plating 15 (18) and Slumber 3 Slumber X: Counter decreases after taking a turn or losing HP. Awakens at the end of its turn if counter has reached 0.

sneaky gremlin.name: Sneaky Gremlin
sneaky gremlin.notes: Starts stunned when summoned after killing Gremlin Merc.

soul fysh.name: Soul Fysh
soul fysh.notes: Beckon: 1 cost status, lose 6 HP if it is in hand at the end of turn. * One of the 2 Intangible from Fade ticks down immediately.

spectral knight.name: Spectral Knight
spectral knight.notes: Hex: While Spectral Knight is alive, all your cards are ethereal.

terror eel.name: Terror Eel
terror eel.notes: Starts with Shriek 75 Shriek X: Becomes Stunned after reaching X HP or below.

the insatiable.name: The Insatiable
the insatiable.notes: Sandpit X: In X turns, instantly die. Frantic Escape: 1 cost status, increase card cost and Sandpit by 1.

thieving hopper.name: Thieving Hopper
thieving hopper.notes: Starts with Escape Artist Escape Artist: Tries to escape the combat after 5 turns. Swipe: Upon killing this enemy, the stolen card is returned. Flutter X: Receives 50% less attack damage. Deal attack damage X times to remove Flutter and stun it.

moves.name: Thievery
effects: (Stolen card is taken from draw or discard pile. Chooses a random card with priorities: 1. non-imbued uncommon card, 2. non-imbued common, rare, or event card, 3. non-imbued basic or quest card, 4. imbued or ancient card, 5. curse or anything else)
(Warning: Game softlocks if Thieving Hopper cannot find a valid target to steal)

tunneler.name: Tunneler
tunneler.notes: Burrowed: Block is not removed at the start of Tunneler's turn. Becomes stunned if all block is removed.

vantom.name: Vantom
vantom.notes: Starts with Slippery 9 Slippery X: The next X times this loses HP, only lose 1.

vine shambler.name: Vine Shambler
vine shambler.notes: Tangled X: Attacks cost 1 additional energy for X turns.

waterfall giant.name: Waterfall Giant
waterfall giant.notes: Steam Eruption X: After dying, wait 1 turn, then attack for X damage. * Heal is multiplied by player count

moves.name: Pressure Gun
effects: N = # of times this move was used
